creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 242826
patch to ports infrastructure to allow architecture-dependent PORTREVISIONs

I am now running with the attached patch. It adds support for one more corner case (only architecture-dependent PORTREVISIONs, no default).

It seems to be having no ill effects after using it in a portmaster -a run of more than 1000 ports.

-- Martin
